data.title: Test suite — integration tests at each milestone stage

data.body: Tests should be written at each primary stage of the build — not deferred to the end. Each milestone (skeleton, content/polish, auth scaffold) should have corresponding tests that verify routes render, navigation works, house data loads, etc. Mobile viewport testing should be included given mobile-first constraint.

data.reason: Already complete; recovery from FRAC-120 agent reset

provenance.reason: Already complete; recovery from FRAC-120 agent reset
